data.title: [7eb8-af48] RED: Write tests for check-plugin-self-ref.sh hook (block + allow cases)
data.description:
## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh — RED bash tests for the pre-commit hook BEFORE the hook is implemented.

## Tests to write (bash, using temporary git staging)

```bash
# Test 1: Unannotated match blocks the commit
# Stage a file containing plugins/dso without annotation → hook must exit 1

# Test 2: Annotated match passes
# Stage a file where the plugins/dso line ends with # plugin-self-ref-ok: <reason> → hook must exit 0

# Test 3: File outside plugins/dso/ is ignored
# Stage a file in tests/ containing plugins/dso → hook must exit 0 (only scans plugins/dso/)

# Test 4: File with no plugins/dso reference passes
# Stage a clean file under plugins/dso/ → hook must exit 0

# Test 5: Error message is actionable
# When blocked, output must include the offending file, line number, and suggestion to add # plugin-self-ref-ok: annotation
```

Use a temp git repo (git init in TMPDIR) to stage test files without polluting the main repo.

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh (chmod +x required)

## testing_mode: RED
All tests must FAIL before check-plugin-self-ref.sh is implemented (hook file does not exist).
